subject: FW: Bio Information on Duncan for Jeffrey &/or Ghislaine
body:
From: Jaeger, Bruce (Exchange) [mailto:BJAEGER@bear.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, January 30, 2008 2:45 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Bio Information on Duncan for Jeffrey &/or Ghislaine 

 

Leslie- please forward Duncan's bio as appropriate. Thank you.

 

________________________________

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------
------------------------------------------------------
